# Propel-Lab

> Propel-Lab LLC is an AI/LLM technology company based in Fukuoka, Japan, engineering next-generation business models through systems thinking and AI.

## Company Info
- Legal Name: Propel-Lab LLC (合同会社 Propel-Lab)
- Location: Fukuoka, Japan (Tenjin 4-6-28, Tenjin First Bldg. 7F)
- Founder & CEO: Ken Imoto (井本 賢)
- Founded: April 24, 2025
- Email: info@propel-lab.co.jp
- URL: https://propel-lab.co.jp/

## Mission
Engineer the next generation of business models through systems thinking and technology.

## Services
1. LearningMate — Educational content and publishing focused on LLM technologies (Claude Code, Context Engineering, LLMO)
2. AI-Loop — SNS automation and content marketing support powered by LLM agents
3. AutoCrew — Business automation consulting using multi-agent LLM systems (MCP, CLI Skills)
4. Yureru — Music and creative project featuring virtual singers Yumei and Silk Reign

## LearningMate (Publishing)
- Author: ken imoto / Series: AI Practice Series for Engineers
- Book 1: Practical Claude Code — Context Engineering for Modern Development (¥980 Kindle / ¥1,000 Zenn)
- Book 2: LLMO — Three Paths for AI to Discover Your Content (¥1,980 Kindle / Zenn)
- Book 3: 実践Claude Code (Japanese, Kindle ¥980 / Zenn ¥1,000)
- Book 4: LLMO — AIがあなたのコンテンツを見つける3つの経路 (Japanese, ¥1,980 Kindle / Zenn)
- Free: MCP Security in Practice (Zenn), Claude Code QuickStart (Zenn)
- Topics: Claude Code, Context Engineering, LLMO, LLM Optimization, MCP, Security, AI Development
- Amazon Author: https://www.amazon.co.jp/stores/author/B0GQNPRCGF
- Zenn (Claude Code): https://zenn.dev/kenimo49/books/claude-code-mastery
- Zenn (LLMO): https://zenn.dev/kenimo49/books/llmo-ai-search-optimization
- Zenn (MCP Security): https://zenn.dev/kenimo49/books/mcp-security-practice
- Zenn (QuickStart): https://zenn.dev/kenimo49/books/claude-code-quickstart

## Yureru (Music Project)
- Concept: Capturing fleeting emotional moments through music, words, and visuals
- Artists: Yumei (main vocal), Silk Reign (ballads)
- Stats: 409+ published tracks / 3,815+ YouTube subscribers
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@Yureru-s4n
